title: Bolsius Tapered Candles - Red - 8-Pack - 24.5 cm - Decorative Household Candles - Burning Time of 7 Hours - Unscented - Includes Natural Vegan Wax - Without Palm Oil
features: Check out the revamped Essentials collection! The Bolsius smooth dinner candle in the colour Delicate Red is 24.5 cm tall, with a burn time of 7 hours. Tapered for a trendy look. Crafted with passion for people and the planet, using natural vegan wax and palm oil free. The collection includes elegant candles in a range of sizes and colours, which can be effortlessly combined with each other. A valuable addition for every interior!
As a timeless classic, Delicate Red is a proper deep red. Intense, seductive and sensual!

Since 1870, Bolsius has been making quality products to create cosiness and a warm ambience in your home. We do this with passion, skilled craftsmanship and a love for people and planet. Bolsius inspires, connects and warms people with the magic of candlelight and fragrances that tickle the senses. It's how you can make every moment a special one. For yourself and for everyone around you.
